title: Personal Portfolio Page
description: Build a static portfolio with sections for About, Skills, and Projects using only HTML and CSS. Focus on semantic HTML and basic responsive design.

title: Weather App
description: Fetch live weather data from an API, display forecasts with icons, and handle loading/error states. Build it using vanilla JavaScript or a framework like React.

title: Drag-and-Drop Kanban Board
description: Build a Trello-like drag-and-drop kanban board from scratch. Features should include multiple columns, drag-and-drop tasks, adding/editing/deleting tasks, and persisting state using localStorage.
